<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Translation\Reader; use Symfony\Component\Translation\MessageCatalogue; /** * TranslationReader reads translation messages from translation files. * * @author Tobias Nyholm <tobias.nyholm@gmail.com> */ interface TranslationReaderInterface { /** * Reads translation messages from a directory to the catalogue. */ public function read(string $directory, MessageCatalogue $catalogue): void; }
